description: Your team is chasing an intermittent bug that only appears when two micro-services exchange requests with the same correlation_id. Two plain-text log files with ISO-8601 timestamps are already present on the machine: • /home/user/serviceA/logs/serviceA.log • /home/user/serviceB/logs/serviceB.log 1. Examine both log files. 2. Find every correlation_id that occurs at least once in each file. 3. For every such id, determine: • how many lines it appears on in serviceA.log • the first timestamp it appears on in serviceA.log • how many lines it appears on in serviceB.log • the first timestamp it appears on in serviceB.log 4. Write those results (in any order) to /home/user/debug/correlation_summary.csv using exactly this comma-separated layout (no spaces): correlation_id,count_serviceA,first_ts_serviceA,count_serviceB,first_ts_serviceB Every subsequent line must follow the same five-field CSV structure, one id per line, ending with a newline character. Do not add extra columns, quotes, or headers. A correctly generated file might look like: correlation_id,count_serviceA,first_ts_serviceA,count_serviceB,first_ts_serviceB abc123,2,2024-04-10T10:00:00Z,2,2024-04-10T10:00:00Z def456,2,2024-04-10T10:00:02Z,2,2024-04-10T10:00:04Z The automated tester will confirm: • /home/user/debug exists • /home/user/debug/correlation_summary.csv exists • The file’s first line is the exact header shown above • Each subsequent line contains exactly five comma-separated fields, with the correct counts and earliest timestamps derived from the logs. You only need a handful of basic shell utilities (grep, sort, awk, cut, etc.). No third-party packages are required. Stick to a short series of clear commands.
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing directories and log files -->
  Directory /home/user/serviceA/logs/ already exists (permissions 755).
  Directory /home/user/serviceB/logs/ already exists (permissions 755).

  File: /home/user/serviceA/logs/serviceA.log (permissions 644)
  Contents (including trailing newline):
  2024-04-10T10:00:00Z INFO correlation_id=abc123 Start request
  2024-04-10T10:00:01Z INFO correlation_id=abc123 End request
  2024-04-10T10:00:02Z INFO correlation_id=def456 Start request
  2024-04-10T10:00:03Z INFO correlation_id=ghi789 Start request
  2024-04-10T10:00:04Z INFO correlation_id=def456 End request

  File: /home/user/serviceB/logs/serviceB.log (permissions 644)
  Contents (including trailing newline):
  2024-04-10T10:00:00Z INFO correlation_id=abc123 Processing request
  2024-04-10T10:00:01Z INFO correlation_id=abc123 Done
  2024-04-10T10:00:04Z INFO correlation_id=def456 Processing request
  2024-04-10T10:00:05Z INFO correlation_id=def456 Done
  2024-04-10T10:00:06Z INFO correlation_id=zzz999 Unknown request

  <!-- Expected artefacts created by agent -->
  Directory /home/user/debug/ must be created (permissions 755).

  File /home/user/debug/correlation_summary.csv (permissions 644)
  Mandatory content (order of the two data lines can vary; header must be first line):

  correlation_id,count_serviceA,first_ts_serviceA,count_serviceB,first_ts_serviceB
  abc123,2,2024-04-10T10:00:00Z,2,2024-04-10T10:00:00Z
  def456,2,2024-04-10T10:00:02Z,2,2024-04-10T10:00:04Z

  The file must end with a final newline character.

  <!-- No other files or directories are evaluated. -->
